zh.Cambusnethan, North Lanarkshire, Scotlan: 英國蘇格蘭諾斯 藍納可爾坎布茲森
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander de Bonkyl - Earl of Menteith於1200年出生在蘇格蘭貝維其可爾時，他的父親Randolph de Bonkyl25歲，母親Margaret Beatrix Douglas25歲。他於1239年與Margaret Jean De Bonkyl在蘇格蘭貝維其可爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1283年在英國蘇格蘭享年83歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander de Bonkyl - Earl of Menteith was born in 1200, in Berwickshire, Scotland, his father, Randolph de Bonkyl, was 25 and his mother, Margaret Beatrix Douglas, was 25. He married Margaret Jean De Bonkyl in 1239, in Berwickshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1283, in Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander de Bonkyl - Earl of Menteith est né en 1200, à Berwickshire, Écosse, son père, Randolph de Bonkyl, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret Beatrix Douglas, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Jean De Bonkyl en 1239, à Berwickshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1283, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 83 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander de Bonkyl - Earl of Menteithが1200年にスコットランドバーウィクシュアイアで生まれた時，父Randolph de Bonkylは25歳，母Margaret Beatrix Douglasは25歳であった。1239年にスコットランドバーウィクシュアイアでMargaret Jean De Bonkylと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1283年にイギリススコットランドで83歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander de Bonkyl - Earl of Menteith(이)가 1200년 스컷랜드 버윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Randolph de Bonkyl(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Beatrix Douglas(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1239년 스컷랜드 버윅실르에서 Margaret Jean De Bonkyl(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1283년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander de Bonkyl - Earl of Menteith родился в 1200 г. в местности бирвиккшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Randolph de Bonkyl было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Beatrix Douglas, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Jean De Bonkyl в 1239 г. в местности бирвиккшир, Шотландия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1283 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 83 лет.
